resources.string: Trial period has ended. Visit our website to continue.
Maximum number of templates reached. Delete one to add another.
Demo period has ended. Only super admin can access this feature.
To use custom templates, sign up for demo or download the latest offline app from our website.
Login succeeded, but profile could not be loaded. Please try again.
Please contact support if you cannot access your profile.
Login session expired. Please try again.
Check notifications, work view, commissions, and contracts
Some locations could not be refreshed. Check your connection.
Pick a PDF from your phone or Firebase. Then use Text or Draw, and tap Export PDF to save and share.
Text mode: tap the page to place text. Use Page ↑ / ↓ to move between pages.
Draw mode: drag with your finger to mark up the page.
PDF editing is not enabled for your account.
PDF editing is not available offline.
Signing in… try again in a moment.
Build a Word document from a PDF (each page as an image). Use Convert to Word to pick a file, then Open or Share the .docx.
Tap Convert to Word to pick a PDF, or use Text from PDF below.
Converting… this may take a minute for large files.
PDF to Word is not enabled for your account.
Converter is not available offline or in restricted mode.

Each PDF page becomes a picture inside the Word file so layout matches the original. Editable text is not extracted automatically—use Word or Docs to add a text box or overlay. For very long PDFs, only the first 40 pages are converted.
No app found to open Word files. Install Word or Google Docs.

Uses the PDF text layer when present, ML Kit OCR when a page looks scanned, and optional password for protected files. Edit below: Copy copies all text; Save as saves .txt or .pdf; Share sends the text.
Extracted text (%1$d page markers). You can edit it above.
This PDF is protected. Enter the password to extract text and use OCR.
That password did not work. Try again.
Build a best-route PDF from the 10 highest-priority nearby contracts.
Create a report or quotation using any of the following
Select templates one at a time to add paragraphs (blank line between each). Or type your own in the box below.
Or type your own recommendations below — dropdown is not required.
Open saved reports, stored files, quotations, agreements, and ERA documents
Open reports saved on this device or browse stored PDFs pulled from Firebase.
Browse quotations on this device, or open Firebase folders: contract IDs under contracts/, and annual Reports folders with subfolders and PDFs.
Access service agreement and ERA documents from one place.
No top-level storage folders found. Check your connection. For only Reports year folders (ReportsXX), use Report folders (cloud).
Cannot list all storage from the app (permissions). Showing reachable Reports year folders only — use Report folders (cloud) for the filtered browser.
Browse folders in your Firebase bucket. Tap a row to open subfolders or files.
Stored Reports is not available in offline mode.
Open a folder or file. Use Back to go up one level.
Enter a valid folder name (no slashes or reserved names).
Open a folder first, then upload files into it.
Enter a number only (e.g. 27). A root folder named Reports27 will be created. You can add any subfolders and files inside Stored Reports.
Choose a report folder, then open subfolders or files.
Reports/ — year folders only (Reports26, two digits)
No report folders found for this account.
No app found to open this file.
Cloud browsing is not available in offline mode.
Search all report files by name…
Only super admins can move cloud files.
You do not have permission to move cloud files.
Tap Move here to use this folder, or open a subfolder first.
Only admins can delete cloud files.
No year folders found for this contract.
No files found in this folder.
Remove \"%1$s\" from cloud storage? This cannot be undone.
Enter a valid file name (no slashes).
Create a quotation – choose a contract type
Loading your profile email from Firebase. Please try again in a moment.
Please fill in all company details
Please sign in to save to cloud
Saved to storage but failed to save record
This report was automatically generated by Company 1
This Action Form was generated by Company 1 Reporting System
Company 1 quote created and saved successfully!
Leave blank for default: Created by reporting system
Sales catalog could not be loaded.
Please fill in customer name, address, date, issue and base price.
Please enter a valid base price.
Quotation details (editable – pre-filled from selected issue)
Description (short summary, e.g. Rodent 3 part rodent riddance)

How to Use the Pest Control App

1. Login and main dashboard

• Login: Sign in with your email and password. Your role (technician, admin, or super admin) and permissions are loaded from your profile (e.g. canSearch, canSeeContracts, canViewAllContracts).

• Main menu: After login you see the main dashboard with buttons for Work View, Jobs, Contracts, Create Report, View Reports, Leads (if enabled), Notifications, and Search (if your account has search enabled). Use Help (this screen) anytime.

2. Reports and quotations

• Create Report: From the main menu open Create Report. You can open Company Report (service report), Contract Quotation (including Custom Quote), Bird Quotation, Action Form, Service Agreements, ERA, Invoice, or Create Custom Report (with your saved template). Each opens the same way; fill the form and save to generate a PDF.

• View Reports: Open View Reports to see saved or uploaded PDFs. Upload PDFs to Firebase Storage using the folder path ReportsYY/Month (e.g. Reports26/January).

3. Contracts\n\nContracts hold customer and visit information. Add and service customer contracts. Mark visits done when you complete a visit so Last Visit and Next Visit stay correct. From a contract you can create reports (fields auto-fill), view past reports by year folder, and add the contract to your Work View schedule.

4. Work View and Jobs

- Use Work View to schedule your day and mark work complete.
- Use Jobs to manage assigned work items.

Custom times and drag-and-drop
- Create with custom duration: Add Job/Contract/Follow-up → when the time dialog appears choose “Custom time…”, enter start (e.g. 08:30) and end (e.g. 15:00).
- Change event time: Tap event → Edit Time → set start/end and save.
- Move event: In daily view, long-press an event, drag to another time slot and release; start moves to that slot, duration is kept.

5. Commission (Leads)\n\nUse Leads to add and track leads and commission where this is enabled for your account. Add a lead, assign a technician or added-by, and track invoices and commission as allowed by your role.

6. Notifications\n\nNotifications are in-app only. Open Notifications from the main menu to see assignments and updates. Each user sees only their own. You can delete individual notifications or clear all.

7. Support and saving\n\nWhen you save a report, the PDF is stored on the device and you can upload it to Storage. When you save a job or add a Work View event, data is saved to the cloud. If something looks wrong, try logging out and back in. Contact your support contact for help.

How to Use the Pest Control App

1. Login and main dashboard (Admin / Super Admin)

• Login and roles: Sign in with email and password. Your role (admin or super_admin) and permissions are loaded from your profile. Admins can see contracts, assign work, and use the Admin Dashboard; super admins also have the Super Admin screen, Location Finder, and Messaging.

• Main menu: Work View, Jobs, Contracts, Create Report, View Reports, Leads, Notifications, Search (if enabled), Admin Dashboard, and (super admin only) Super Admin. Use Help anytime.

2. Reports and quotations (Admin)

• Create Report: Same flow as technicians — Company Report, Contract Quotation (incl. Custom Quote), Action Form, Create Custom Report, etc. Create reports from Contracts/Jobs or from the main menu.

• Upload PDFs to Firebase Storage: ReportsYY/Month/<PDF>. Use View Reports to share with customers/office.

3. Contracts (Admin)\n\nAdd contracts from the main menu. Use the Assign-to dropdown to assign a technician; the assigned technician receives an in-app notification. You can view, edit, and delete contracts where your role permits. From a contract you can create reports, view past reports by year folder, and add the contract to a technician’s Work View schedule.

4. Work View and Jobs (Admin)

Work View: Schedule events and mark complete.
- Reminders are scheduled ~30 minutes before jobs/contracts.
- Custom duration: Add Job/Contract/Follow-up → “Custom time…” → enter start and end (e.g. 08:30 and 15:00).
- Edit time: Tap event → Edit Time → change start/end and save.
- Move event: Long-press in daily view, drag to another slot, release; duration is kept.

Jobs
- Create jobs and assign technician via dropdown.
- Admins may have additional delete/edit capabilities depending on role flags.

5. Commission (Leads) (Admin)\n\nUse Leads for oversight. Add and track leads; assign technicians or added-by. Updating materials or commission can notify the assigned technician. Use this to keep commission and invoices in order across the team.

6. Notifications (Admin)\n\nNotifications are in-app only. Open Notifications to see assignments and updates. Each user sees only their own. Use them to audit what was assigned and when. You can delete individual notifications or clear all from your own list.

7. Support (Admin)\n\nWhen staff report missing items, confirm assignment and owner are correct. For report issues, confirm the correct Storage year folder was used and upload completed. When you save a report, job, or Work View event, data is saved to the cloud. Contact your support path for further help.

How to Use the Pest Control App

1. Login and main dashboard (Technician)

• Login: Sign in with your email and password. Your role and permissions (e.g. canSearch, canSeeContracts) are loaded from your profile.

• Main menu: Work View, Jobs, Contracts, Create Report, View Reports, Leads (if enabled), Notifications. If your account has search enabled, the Search button appears — use it to find contracts, reports, commission, and work view items. Use Help (this screen) anytime.

2. Reports and quotations (Technician)

• Create Report: From the main menu open Create Report. You can open Company Report (service report), Contract Quotation (including Custom Quote), Action Form, or Create Custom Report. Each works the same: fill the form and save to generate a PDF. Create reports from Jobs or Contracts so fields auto-fill.

• Upload: Use folder path ReportsYY/Month (e.g. Reports26/January). Use View Reports to open and share saved or uploaded PDFs.

3. Contracts\n\nContracts hold customer and visit information. Add and service customer contracts. Mark visits done when you complete a visit so Last Visit and Next Visit stay correct. From a contract you can create reports (fields auto-fill), view past reports by year folder, and add the contract to your Work View schedule.

4. Jobs & Work View

Work View + Jobs (Technician)

Work View
- Check your daily schedule and upcoming events.
- Mark events complete when finished.
- Custom duration: Add Job/Contract/Follow-up → when the time dialog appears choose “Custom time…”, enter start (e.g. 08:30) and end (e.g. 15:00).
- Change event time: Tap event → Edit Time → set start/end and save.
- Move event: In daily view, long-press an event, drag to another time slot and release; start moves to that slot, duration is kept.

5. Commission

Commission (Leads) (Technician)

- Use Leads to track invoices/commission where enabled.
6. Notifications\n\nNotifications are in-app only. Open Notifications from the main menu to see assignments and updates. You see only your own. You can delete individual notifications or clear all.

7. Support and saving\n\nWhen you save a report, the PDF is stored on the device and you can upload it to Storage. When you save a job or add a Work View event, data is saved to the cloud. If something needs correcting in jobs or contracts, contact support. If reports are missing, confirm you uploaded to the correct year folder (ReportsYY/Month).

How to Use the Pest Control App

1. Getting started

After login you see the main menu. Your main tools are Work View, Jobs, Contracts, and Reports. Use Notifications to see assigned work and updates. Use Help (this screen) anytime. Search is available if your account has search enabled.

2. Reports\n\nCreate reports from the main menu, from Jobs, or from Contracts. Report types include Company Report, Generic Report, and Action Form. When you save a report, a PDF is created on the device. Upload PDFs to Firebase Storage before removing local copies. Use the folder path ReportsYY/Month (e.g. Reports26/January). Use View Reports to open and share saved or uploaded PDFs.

Contracts

- Add and service customer contracts.
- Mark visits done to keep Last/Next Visit correct.

4. Work View and Jobs

- Use Work View to schedule your day and mark work complete.
- Use Jobs to manage assigned work items.

Custom times and drag-and-drop
- Create with custom duration: Add Job/Contract/Follow-up → when the time dialog appears choose “Custom time…”, enter start (e.g. 08:30) and end (e.g. 15:00).
- Change event time: Tap event → Edit Time → set start/end and save.
- Move event: In daily view, long-press an event, drag to another time slot and release; start moves to that slot, duration is kept.

5. Commission (Leads)\n\nUse Leads to add and track leads and commission where this is enabled for your account. Add a lead, assign a technician or added-by, and track invoices and commission as allowed by your role.

6. Notifications\n\nNotifications are in-app only. Open Notifications from the main menu to see assignments and updates. Each user sees only their own. You can delete individual notifications or clear all.

7. Support and saving\n\nWhen you save a report, the PDF is stored on the device and you can upload it to Storage. When you save a job or add a Work View event, data is saved to the cloud. If something looks wrong, try logging out and back in. Contact your support contact for help.

API keys for the AI Fix feature are stored in Firestore (collection AI-Chat, document AI-API). Only a super admin can update them via Firebase Console.

• KEY = Hugging Face token (Inference permissions).
• key-grog = Groq API key.

The app uses Groq if key-grog is set; otherwise Hugging Face if KEY is set. Set at least one in Firestore.
Open Stored Reports with all top-level folders (companies, invoices, contract trees, etc.). The normal View Reports → Stored Reports list hides these for safety.
Delete this invoice record and file?
Invoices are available to admin users only.
Invoices and billing are available to users with invoice access.
Invoice access is required to create invoices.
You do not have permission to access invoices.
Please enter customer name, title, and amount.
Contract is optional. Enter customer details, subtotal, and VAT rate.
Draw your signature in the box above
35 Limekiln Green, Dublin 12, Dublin, D12 V6Y2, Ireland
Payment can be made via bank transfer into the following account — IBAN: IE06 BOFI 9002 8726 8406 22. Alternatively, call 0879134971 if you wish to make a card payment.
Registered in Republic of Ireland No. IE732110
Registered Address 35 Limekiln Green, Dublin 12, Dublin, D12 V6Y2, Ireland
Initial pest control setup and onboarding service.
Monthly pest control maintenance and support service.
Additional pest control service or agreed feature update.
Pest control service as described below.
